step_rationale: Dimerizes with integrin beta-2 in thrombosis; platelet activation.
mechanism: Integrin alpha subunits heterodimerize with integrin beta-2 to mediate platelet adhesion and aggregation in thrombosis.

references.title: Extracellular vesicles from the lung pro-thrombotic niche drive cancer-associated thrombosis and metastasis via integrin beta 2.
